markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's evolving sales contract strategy and best practices with Nathan Broome, leveraging his experience from Outreach's growth.](https://fathom.video/share/xqUsCErVggnCmpDLzmfUYby8uRqadaS5?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is transitioning from a rigid 12-month contract model to a more flexible, agency-like approach with an initial paid calibration phase](https://fathom.video/share/xqUsCErVggnCmpDLzmfUYby8uRqadaS5?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
  - [The company faces challenges with over-promising and resource allocation due to rapid sales growth and platform development lag](https://fathom.video/share/xqUsCErVggnCmpDLzmfUYby8uRqadaS5?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [Nathan advises embracing the pilot/sprint model if it fits the market, standardizing offerings, and framing proposals as longer-term engagements with de-risking elements](https://fathom.video/share/xqUsCErVggnCmpDLzmfUYby8uRqadaS5?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Contract Evolution

  - [Shifted from a 12-month term with defined deliverables to a more flexible, agency-like model](https://fathom.video/share/xqUsCErVggnCmpDLzmfUYby8uRqadaS5?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
  - [Previous 90-day opt-out pilot period caused issues with customer commitment and value demonstration](https://fathom.video/share/xqUsCErVggnCmpDLzmfUYby8uRqadaS5?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [New approach: 8-week paid calibration phase, followed by an ongoing engagement](https://fathom.video/share/xqUsCErVggnCmpDLzmfUYby8uRqadaS5?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
  - [Challenges include over-promising and allocating engineers to individual engagements, impacting velocity](https://fathom.video/share/xqUsCErVggnCmpDLzmfUYby8uRqadaS5?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)

### Market Positioning and Product Offering

  - [Current offering resembles an AI content/growth agency rather than a traditional SaaS product](https://fathom.video/share/xqUsCErVggnCmpDLzmfUYby8uRqadaS5?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [15 engineers working on platform development, but customer-facing product not yet available](https://fathom.video/share/xqUsCErVggnCmpDLzmfUYby8uRqadaS5?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
  - [Content creation primarily focused on SEO, which requires 6-12 months to show significant impact](https://fathom.video/share/xqUsCErVggnCmpDLzmfUYby8uRqadaS5?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
  - [Debate on necessity of custom work for each engagement vs. standardized offerings](https://fathom.video/share/xqUsCErVggnCmpDLzmfUYby8uRqadaS5?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)

### Contract Structure and Sales Strategy

  - [Nathan suggests embracing the pilot/sprint model if it aligns with market demands](https://fathom.video/share/xqUsCErVggnCmpDLzmfUYby8uRqadaS5?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
  - [Recommends standardizing 3-4 month sprints to cover 80% of use cases, enabling scalability](https://fathom.video/share/xqUsCErVggnCmpDLzmfUYby8uRqadaS5?tab=summary&timestamp=1008.0)
  - [Advises framing proposals as 12-15 month contracts with de-risking elements (e.g., initial paid calibration phase)](https://fathom.video/share/xqUsCErVggnCmpDLzmfUYby8uRqadaS5?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
  - [Emphasizes importance of clear success criteria, adoption cadences, and regular check-ins during pilot periods](https://fathom.video/share/xqUsCErVggnCmpDLzmfUYby8uRqadaS5?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)

### Lessons from Outreach's Growth

  - [Nathan joined Outreach at 10 employees, left at 275+ employees](https://fathom.video/share/xqUsCErVggnCmpDLzmfUYby8uRqadaS5?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [Witnessed evolution from flexible, "any-which-way" contracting to more structured approaches](https://fathom.video/share/xqUsCErVggnCmpDLzmfUYby8uRqadaS5?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Highlights importance of standardization and scalability in contract models](https://fathom.video/share/xqUsCErVggnCmpDLzmfUYby8uRqadaS5?tab=summary&timestamp=1033.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Evaluate and potentially implement Nathan's suggestion of framing proposals as longer-term engagements with de-risking elements](https://fathom.video/share/xqUsCErVggnCmpDLzmfUYby8uRqadaS5?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
  - [Develop standardized offerings for the initial calibration/sprint phase to improve scalability](https://fathom.video/share/xqUsCErVggnCmpDLzmfUYby8uRqadaS5?tab=summary&timestamp=1008.0)
  - [Establish clear success criteria and check-in schedules for pilot periods](https://fathom.video/share/xqUsCErVggnCmpDLzmfUYby8uRqadaS5?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
  - [Consider how to balance custom work requests with standardized offerings to manage resource allocation](https://fathom.video/share/xqUsCErVggnCmpDLzmfUYby8uRqadaS5?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
  - [Continue refining the contract model based on market feedback and internal capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/xqUsCErVggnCmpDLzmfUYby8uRqadaS5?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)
